docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $287.70 FILED BY WAI M. LEUNG (DBA) IHAIRBOOK AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, YUJU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAI M LEUNG DBA IHAIRBOOK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YUJU LIN IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAI M. LEUNG (DBA) IHAIRBOOK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIN, YUJU $212.75 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $242.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
